## Scenario

Describe the project-manager workflow or real-world project problem.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe what ProjVault should do.

## Evidence Or Example

Share a redacted example if useful. Do not include customer data, secrets or private project documents.

## Priority

- [ ] P0: blocks real use
- [ ] P1: important improvement
- [ ] P2: nice to have
